---
title: "Technical File: Time Series Analysis of State Tract-level Data"
author: 
- "Nathan Alexander, PhD"
- "Ethan Gwinn"
- "Howard University"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float: true  # Enable floating TOC in the sidebar
    number_sections: true
    theme: cerulean
    always_allow_html: true
    self_contained: true
editor_options:
  markdown:
    wrap: sentence
---

# Project setup

```{r setup, include=F, warning=F, message=F}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
library(here)
here::i_am("technical-file-time-series-tract.Rmd")

# install packages
#install.packages("tidycensus")
#install.packages("tidyverse")
#install.packages("mapview")
#install.packages("mapgl")
library(tidycensus)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(sf)
library(viridis)
library(scales)
library(readr)
```
